name: My Shirox Repo
subtitle: Personal anime library manager for iOS
description: Shirox is a free, open-source personal anime library manager for iOS 15+.

apps.name: Shirox
apps.subtitle: Personal anime library manager for iOS
apps.localizedDescription:
Shirox is a free, open-source personal anime library manager for iOS 15+.

• Organize your anime collection with community-built modules
• AniList integration for library management and discovery
• Continue Watching — pick up right where you left off
• Picture-in-Picture and AirPlay support
• Subtitle support

news.title: New in 0.0.94 — My Library holds everything
news.caption: My Library now holds everything — not just anime matched to AniList or MyAnimeList. Titles you watch from streaming modules without a provider match, and your own imported local files, now appear in My Library too.
